role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and stayed within domain constraints.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil, and vegetation density consistent with the Kalahari biome.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on tree morphology (Acacia/Vachellia) and growth habits.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure (shoulders, markings) and absence of signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Relied on camera artifacts and coverage patterns, which is the correct scope for this role.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country. The specialists provided grounded evidence, and the tournament effectively used the 'meta' evidence (camera artifacts) to distinguish between the two most similar candidates (Botswana and Namibia).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat, arid terrain and sandy soil match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of flat-topped acacia trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the road surface and lack of shoulders match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the camera blur artifact match the image.
